prompt: Fix the duplicate instance name bug in modules/media-server/recyclarr.yml. Recyclarr requires unique instance names across all service types. Currently both Sonarr and Radarr use 'main' as their instance name. Rename them to unique names (e.g. 'sonarr' and 'radarr'). This is a one-line-per-instance change in recyclarr.yml.
